name: Google Tasks
description: Task management app from Google integrated with Gmail, Calendar, and Workspace for creating and tracking to-do lists.

years.notes: Current Workspace-aligned logo introduced September 2021 (announced 2021-09-15, rollout starting 2021-09-23). Replaces the original 2018 blue circle with yellow dot + white pill checkmark. Two-tone blue: light blue (#2684FC) ring and checkmark, darker blue (#0066DA) pill overlay where the checkmark crosses the ring. Source viewBox 0 0 527.1 500 fitted into 0 0 24 24 via a single translate+scale wrapper group baked at build via SVGO convertTransform.

2026 Workspace-wide redesign (rollout began May 2026 ahead of Google I/O 2026). Horizontally-elongated rounded pill with a vertical gradient (#3186FF top through #949DFF purple bottom), a stroked white checkmark, and a light-blue (#BBE2FE) shadow pill underneath suggesting depth. Geometry sourced verbatim from the official Figma community file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026'.
